meaning: vi.(因害怕或寒冷的)发抖,战栗n.一阵战栗,可怕的性质(影响),<苏格兰>一点,一粒薄浮冰,雪
examples: The grue problem is one of the models of scientific hypothesis choice.
The grue paradox is the paradoxical state in the theory of belief acceptance.
Confronted with the challenge of the grue paradox, the falsifiabilists answer it both in qualitative way and the quantitative one.
Either nature or nurture (in a non-grue language) might explain that observation.
